ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the tweet */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (ranging from -1 to 1) */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the tweet was posted */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Reference to the location from where the tweet was posted */,
  "platform" TEXT /* The social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "post_time" TEXT /* The exact time when the tweet was posted (hour, minute, second) */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* The number of retweets */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* The number of likes */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* The number of replies */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* The number of quotes */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "is_reply" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a reply to another tweet */,
  "is_quote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a quote of another tweet */,
  "parent_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent tweet if the tweet is a retweet, reply, or quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date when the user joined the social media platform */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* The full name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* The user's bio or description */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* The number of followers */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* The number of users the user is following */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile image */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* The social media platforms the user is active on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* The name of the hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet that uses the hashtag */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* The trend score of the hashtag */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the hashtag started trending */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* The date when the hashtag stopped trending */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who was mentioned */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet that contains the mention */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* The type of mention (e.g., user, brand, event) */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "is_urban" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is urban */,
  "is_rural" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is rural */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* The sentiment score (ranging from -1 to 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label for the sentiment (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* The date when the tweet was posted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the tweet was posted */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month when the tweet was posted */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day when the tweet was posted */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour when the tweet was posted */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute when the tweet was posted */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second when the tweet was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_dates_tweet_date FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_date") REFERENCES tweets ("post_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet that contains the media */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of the media file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media file */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "media_format" TEXT /* Format of the media file (e.g., JPEG, PNG, MP4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet that contains the link */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "link_title" TEXT /* Title of the linked page */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the linked page */,
  "link_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the linked URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_links_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* The name of the topic */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet that discusses the topic */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., Entertainment, Politics, Health) */,
  "topic_trend_score" REAL /* Trend score of the topic */,
  "topic_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the topic started trending */,
  "topic_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the topic stopped trending */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* The name of the product */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet that mentions the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Technology, Fashion, Food) */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_products_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* The name of the event */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet that mentions the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Concert, Conference, Holiday) */,
  "event_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "event_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_events_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
